typography.notes: Chosen for a 'craft tool for thinking' aesthetic. Avoided standard tech sans-serifs (Inter/Roboto) to provide a grounded, physical feel.

layout.grid_strategy: Control Room Grid for dashboards, but single narrow column (max-w-3xl) for the note editor.

editor.metadata_block: flex items-center gap-4 py-6 mb-8 border-b border-[#E6E5DF] text-sm font-mono text-[#7A7871]

ai_suggestions_panel.card_style: p-4 rounded-xl border border-[#E6E5DF] bg-white hover:border-[#8A9482] transition-colors shadow-sm
ai_suggestions_panel.ai_highlight: relative overflow-hidden before:absolute before:inset-0 before:border before:border-[#B2C9A1]/50 before:rounded-xl

tags.style: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-md text-xs font-medium bg-[#EDECE6] text-[#7A7871]

icons.strategy: Use minimal, stroke-based icons. Maintain consistent stroke-width (1.5px).

empty_state_illustration.description: Soft orange abstract shapes, use for 'No Notes Found' or onboarding empty states, clipped nicely in a rounded container with opacity.

user_avatar.description: Avatar for the single user profile at the top/bottom of the sidebar.

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass APCA contrast checks. Primary text on #FBFBF9 is high contrast. Muted text (#7A7871) remains readable.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 3-pane layout for desktop: Sidebar (Left, 280px), Main Editor (Center, flex-1), AI Suggestions (Right, 320px). On mobile, stack them or use drawers.
The sidebar must contain the specific object types: Notes, People, Tasks, Ideas, Books, Projects, Meetings, Daily logs. Include a generic icon for each.
In the main editor, use a massive, font-light heading for the note title (Manrope, text-5xl/6xl). Do NOT center the text in the editor; left-align everything in a max-w-3xl container.
For the AI tags and suggested notes, use the 'ai_generated' colors. AI-suggested related notes should appear in the right panel as small cards showing context and match percentage.
Use raw HTML/Tailwind for structural layout to maintain the 'craft' feel, while relying on Shadcn for interactive components (Dropdowns for object type changing, Dialogs for search).
Do NOT use a standard 'Card' component wrapper for the editor. The background should flow seamlessly. Cards should only be used in the right-side AI panel or for listing objects in a grid.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (e.g., sidebar links, new note button, AI tag chips).
